---
title: "research"
---

## pre-prints

*Variance estimation for Sequential Monte Carlo Algorithms: a backward sampling approach*. **Yazid Janati El idrissi**, Sylvain Le Corff, Yohan Petetin. 2022, *under review*. [pdf](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2204.01401.pdf)

## publications

1. *NEO: Non Equilibrium Sampling on the Orbit of a Deterministic Transform.* Achille Thin, **Yazid Janati El Idrissi**, Sylvain Le Corff, Charles Ollion, Eric Moulines, Arnaud Doucet, Alain Durmus, and Christian X. Robert. *Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems 34 (2021): 17060-17071.* [pdf](https://proceedings.neurips.cc/paper/2021/file/8dd291cbea8f231982db0fb1716dfc55-Paper.pdf)

2.  *Structured variational Bayesian inference for Gaussian state-space models with regime switching.* Yohan Petetin, **Yazid Janati El Idrissi**, and François Desbouvries. *IEEE Signal Processing Letters 28 (2021): 1953-1957.*
